log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+6=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 19 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:15+6=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 33 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===

=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:8+6=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:8+6=14 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster.
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 41/67
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+6=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:14+6=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
